name: opl-fabric
description: Contract-first OPL Fabric resource control plane.

scripts.test: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:go && npm run test:console
scripts.test:console: test ! -f apps/fabric-console/package.json || (npm --prefix apps/fabric-console run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/fabric-console run build)
scripts.build: test ! -f apps/fabric-console/package.json || npm --prefix apps/fabric-console run build
